headline: Are Analysts Crazy? Price Targets Suggest 29% Jump In S&P 500. These 10 Stocks Show Highest Potential Gains.

headline: Bitcoin Price Rises as War Escalates. Why Cryptos Are Havens Once Again.
summary: The price of  Bitcoin  which fell to nearly $65,000 over the past 24 hours, was rising early Monday amid fears of a widening conflict in the Middle East.  The world’s largest cryptocurrency was up 1.5% to $67,462, according to CoinDesk data.  Robinhood, a digital asset brokerage, was up 2.1% ahead of the bell, while Strategy —the largest corporate holder of Bitcoin—rose 1.7%.

headline: Bitcoin, XRP, Ethereum Rise as War Escalates. Why Cryptos Are Havens Again.
summary: The price of  Bitcoin  which fell to nearly $65,000 over the past 24 hours, was rising early Monday amid fears of a widening conflict in the Middle East.  The world’s largest cryptocurrency was up 1.5% to $67,462, according to CoinDesk data.  Robinhood, a digital asset brokerage, was up 2.1% ahead of the bell, while Strategy —the largest corporate holder of Bitcoin—rose 1.7%.
